scripts.test: npx cypress run -- config viewportWidth=1440, viewportHeight=900
scripts.test:login: npx cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/login.cy.js -- config viewportWidth=1440, viewportHeight=900
scripts.test:login:mobile: npx cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/login.cy.js -- config viewportWidth=414, viewportHeight=896
